title: BOQ Projects
description: Campus, building and floor BOQs with cost roll-up to a single summary.

steps.title: Your BOQ projects
steps.description: Costs roll up floor → building → campus.
steps.voiceScript: Costs roll up from each floor to the building and the whole campus.
steps.captionText: Costs roll up from each floor to the building and the whole campus.

steps.title: Configure
